title: Oportun Financial (OPRT) Q3 Earnings: Taking a Look at Key Metrics Versus Estimates
text: Oportun Financial Corp reported Q3 2024 results with revenue of $250 million for the quarter ended September 2024, representing a year-over-year decline of 6.8%. EPS of $0.02 for the same period compares to -$0.46 a year ago. Based on the one-year price targets offered by 2 analysts, the average target price for Oportun Financial Corp is $5.75 with a high estimate of $8 and a low estimate of $3.5. Based on the consensus recommendation from 4 brokerage firms, Oportun Financial's average brokerage recommendation is currently 2.8, indicating a Hold status. Q3 2024 earnings release took place on November 12, 2024, with company guidance and management commentary focused on profitability improvements despite revenue headwinds.
